name: Apple-Pineapple Strudel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the bottom of a nonstick 9-inch round or square cake pan or pie pan with cooking spray until slick.
2. Line the pan with torn pieces of phyllo pastry, reserving two-thirds for the top crust.
3. Stir together remaining ingredients (except butter) in a bowl and spoon into the pan.
4. Cover the apple mixture with 2 layers of phyllo pastry, torn to fit, and brush each layer lightly with melted butter.
5. Tuck the edges of the pastry into the pan.
6. Bake uncovered in a preheated 400°F oven for 20 to 30 minutes, until the pastry is flaky.
{125 calories per serving}
WITH SUGAR SUBSTITUE: Omit honey. After spooning half the apple mixture into the pan, sprinkle with granulated sugar substitute to equal 3 tablespoons sugar. Add remaining apple mixture. Proceed as directed. {95 calories per serving}
